name: Portuguese Potato & Giblet Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 500 grams floury potatoes, cooked and mashed
recipeInstructions: Turkeys appeared on Portuguese tables as early as the 16th century, introduced by explorers, so Portuguese turkey stuffings have a long history. Fry the onions gently in the butter. Chop the giblets small and add to the onions, cooking gently until tender. Combine the mashed potatoes with the eggs, olives, and parsley. Add the giblet mixture and seasonings.
